description_long: This jewelry piece features an elaborate and ornate design, dominated by a large faceted gemstone at the top, surrounded by swirling, filigree-like metalwork. Multiple spherical beads of varying sizes are arranged symmetrically along the vertical axis, adding dimensionality and visual interest. The central body is richly textured, with intricate patterns and layered elements that suggest a handcrafted, baroque style. The overall form is vertically elongated, with the gemstone and scrollwork creating a regal, crown-like appearance. The deep blue color throughout gives the piece a luxurious and striking presence. The design is highly decorative, with a strong emphasis on symmetry and ornamental detail.
description: An ornate, deep blue pendant with a large faceted gemstone, swirling filigree, and multiple spherical beads in a symmetrical, elaborate design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the symmetrical arrangement of swirling filigree, the prominent central gemstone, and layered beads.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the filigree and beadwork, revealing the three-dimensional layering and the protruding gemstone.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the central body, with the filigree and beads forming a mirrored, decorative pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizes the intricate layering and the way the filigree and beads extend outward from the central axis.
